name: server-rules
description: Generic server-rules embed with placeholder fields. Edit fields after import.

embeds.title: 📜 Server rules
embeds.description: By participating in this server you agree to follow the rules below. Violations may result in warnings, mutes, or bans depending on severity.

fields.name: 1. Be respectful
fields.value: No harassment, slurs, hate speech, or personal attacks. Disagreement is fine; cruelty is not.

fields.name: 2. No spam
fields.value: Don't flood channels, ping for no reason, or post the same thing in multiple channels.

fields.name: 3. Stay on topic
fields.value: Use the right channel. Off-topic posts will be moved or removed.

fields.name: 4. Safe content only
fields.value: No NSFW outside designated channels. No gore, no shock content, no doxxing.

fields.name: 5. English in main channels
fields.value: Other languages are welcome in their dedicated channels.

fields.name: 6. Listen to staff
fields.value: Mods have final say. If you disagree, DM a mod calmly — don't argue in public.
